channel.title: Physics on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Physics on Arrans github.io

item.title: sharkdp/numbat
item.description: A statically typed programming language for scientific computations with first class support for physical dimensions and units

item.title: jakecoffman/cp
item.description: A pure Go physics library with no dependencies. Unofficial Chipmunk2D port.
